subject: Re: Windows version still updated ?
body:
Hi Julien,
Two things
- Dimitry lost the password to the server so the old website will not be updated, the new website is currently hosted at 
https://warpem.github.io/warp/
 and contains the content from the old site… I’m not sure why the site has gone offline though, they have been up in parallel until recently.
- the windows version of Warp has received less attention recently and will likely continue to diverge. We do plan to distribute windows binaries but this is not yet set up, currently you would have to compile the application yourself.
Cheers,
Alister
Sent from mobile - apologies for brevity
On Sep 24, 2024, at 05:52, Julien Maufront <julien.maufront@gmail.com> wrote:
﻿
Dear WARP community,
Since the Linux version has been released now, does the Windows version of WARP would still be updated ? I could not access anymore the warpem website.
Best regards,
Julien Maufront
